name: Generate JSON-LD Product schema from an HTML product page
prompt: Read the product page in product-page.html and generate a valid JSON-LD structured data file called schema.json for the product. The schema must use schema.org vocabulary and include: @context (schema.org), @type (Product), name, description, brand (as an Organization with name), sku, offers (with @type Offer, price as a number, priceCurrency, and availability using schema.org URL format like https://schema.org/InStock), and aggregateRating (with @type AggregateRating, ratingValue, and reviewCount). Extract all values from the HTML content.

criteria.description: Output file created and valid JSON
Product name, description, brand, SKU extracted

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
